parsed_output.justification: The transcript shows Jacob identifying himself as the Seer and Zack stating he is the Robber—both village roles—leaving Hunter as an outlier who claims to be a Werewolf. His self‑declaration strongly suggests an attempt to mislead and the only reasonable interpretation is that he is the werewolf. No other player’s statements indicate the role of a werewolf or a Minion. Hence Hunter is singularly suspect.
